dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8148 IH: Prediction Market Restrictions on Insider Speculation and Knowledge-Trading Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moulton introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To reaffirm the Commodity Futures Trading Commission’s authority to enforce prohibited activity on prediction markets.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Prediction Market Restrictions on Insider Speculation and Knowledge-Trading Act or the Prediction Market RISK Act.

The term prediction market contract means any financial instrument, contract, or derivative listed on or offered by a platform engaged in interstate commerce and tied to the occurrence or non-occurrence of a future event, including market-based event contracts.

section.header: CFTC authority to enforce prohibited transactions occurring in relation to a prediction market contract
section.text: Section 4(c) and section 6(c) of the Commodity Exchange Act (7 U.S.C. 7a–2(c)) apply to illegal trading practices occurring with relation to a prediction market contract.
